description: Use this API to return real branch flow values. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, rval = brnmsc(ibus,jbus,ickt,string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the branch quantity desired. (input).

string.description: Branch MVA flow.
Same as ‘MVA’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Branch current in amps.
Branch current in pu.
Angle of branch current in degrees.
Percent current loading of RATEA.
Percent current loading of RATEB.
Percent current loading of RATEC.
Percent MVA loading of RATEA.
Percent MVA loading of RATEB.
Percent MVA loading of RATEC.
Percent current or MVA loading (according to the appropriate percent loading units program option setting) of RATEA.
Percent current or MVA loading (according to the appropriate percent loading units program option setting) of RATEB.
Percent current or MVA loading (according to the appropriate percent loading units program option setting) of RATEC.
Branch MW flow at the IBUS end of the branch.
Same as ‘P’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Branch Mvar flow at the IBUS end of the branch.
Same as ‘Q’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Branch active power losses in MW.
Branch active power losses in units determined by the power output option setting.
Branch reactive power losses in Mvar.
Branch reactive power losses in units determined by the power output option setting.

error_codes.description: Branch out-of-service; ‘RVAL’ returned set to zero.
No base kV at IBUS; ‘RVAL’ returned = per unit current.
Rating is zero; ‘RVAL’ returned set to zero.
